display.purpose: Hero, trip, and Memory Director statements only.

body.purpose: Controls, evidence, explanations, and story editing.

shadows.name: structural-lift
shadows.purpose: Featured journey and active create-trip workspace only.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Controls, state change, and camera settling.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Hover, focus, and reversible product state.

motion.name: camera
motion.purpose: Map scale and position changes during playback.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single highest-priority action in a local surface.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { min-height:44px; padding:12px 16px; border:0; border-radius:6px; background:oklch(0.39 0.112 150); color:white; font:680 15px Inter,system-ui,sans-serif; transition:transform 180ms cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1),background 180ms cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background:oklch(0.34 0.105 150); transform:translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform:translateY(0); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline:3px solid oklch(0.78 0.10 218); outline-offset:3px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: A familiar bordered control for optional or reversible actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { min-height:44px; padding:11px 15px; border:1px solid oklch(0.84 0.012 150); border-radius:6px; background:white; color:oklch(0.18 0.018 150); font:680 15px Inter,system-ui,sans-serif; transition:background 180ms cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1),border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background:oklch(0.92 0.04 150); border-color:oklch(0.52 0.142 150); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline:3px solid oklch(0.78 0.10 218); outline-offset:3px; }

components.name: Date Field
components.description: A standard, durable field for the human-controlled trip boundary.
components.css: .ds-field { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:7px; color:oklch(0.18 0.018 150); font:680 12px Inter,system-ui,sans-serif; } .ds-field input { min-height:44px; padding:11px 12px; border:1px solid oklch(0.84 0.012 150); border-radius:6px; background:white; color:oklch(0.18 0.018 150); font:400 15px Inter,system-ui,sans-serif; } .ds-field input:focus-visible { outline:3px solid oklch(0.78 0.10 218); outline-offset:3px; }

components.name: Certainty Chip
components.description: Text-plus-color grounding state for model output.
components.css: .ds-certainty { display:inline-flex; padding:4px 7px; border-radius:999px; background:oklch(0.92 0.04 150); color:oklch(0.39 0.112 150); font:740 10px Inter,system-ui,sans-serif; letter-spacing:.04em; text-transform:uppercase; }

components.name: Cinematic Map
components.description: The signature Night Sea canvas with a progressive route and moving ember.
components.css: .ds-map { width:300px; height:150px; overflow:hidden; border-radius:10px; background:oklch(0.13 0.025 164); } .ds-map svg { display:block; width:100%; height:100%; } .ds-land { fill:oklch(0.25 0.04 154); } .ds-route { fill:none; stroke:oklch(0.88 0.16 150); stroke-width:2.5; stroke-linecap:round; } .ds-marker { fill:oklch(0.61 0.19 32); stroke:white; stroke-width:2; }

narrative.overview: There I Was feels like a beautifully edited atlas that wakes up when the user presses Play. The product surrounding the map is quiet, exact, and familiar; the journey canvas earns the drama. White work surfaces and near-black ink establish trust, while waypoint green marks actions and evidence. The moving marker alone carries vermilion, so the eye always knows where now is.
keyCharacteristics: Pure white product surfaces interrupted by a deep geographic canvas.
Editorial serif for memory and journey statements; system sans for every task and datum.
Restrained component motion; expressive playback motion only.
Grounding, privacy, and uncertainty expressed as ordinary product affordances.

rules.name: The Moving Ember Rule
rules.body: Vermilion marks the current location or genuinely urgent state.

rules.name: The Two Voices Rule
rules.body: Serif expresses journey and memory; sans performs every task.

rules.name: The Flat Until Lifted Rule
rules.body: Resting panels use color and spacing; shadows appear only for true elevation.

dos: Do make the route the largest and most expressive object on a trip screen.
Do label observed, inferred, and user-supplied content in text.
Do keep every animation meaningful, interruptible, keyboard-operable, and safe under reduced motion.
donts: Don't reproduce Google Timeline as a utilitarian log.
Don't build a generic SaaS dashboard.
Don't use neon AI gradients, gradient text, glassmorphism, or chat-first model interaction.
Don't use parchment, stamps, doodles, handwritten scripts, or nostalgic travel-journal decoration.
